localized_docs.text: Enable IMAP in Gmail settings. Use an App Password if 2FA is enabled.
Microsoft requires OAuth2 for Outlook.com accounts.
Use an App Password for third-party mail apps. Generate one in your Yahoo account security settings.
Generate an app-specific password at appleid.apple.com to use iCloud Mail with third-party apps.
Enable IMAP access in Mail.ru settings and generate an app password.
